3168410.name: Escape The School
3168410.description: Escape The School is a horror game where you have to navigate through the dark parts of the school and other areas, collect objects and perform other tasks. Collect documents to expand the story, learn what's going on in the school and avoid all threats from the school staff. Shine your flashlight on your way and keep an eye on every corner and corridor. Run and hide from your enemies with the accompaniment of chasing music.
3168410.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
